creator: rigoletto@freebsd.org
text:
After reinstalling with debug support deskutils/owncloudclient shamefully do not segfault anymore, neither create a core dump file.

Running it from gdb just give this output:


Starting program: /usr/local/bin/owncloud 
[New LWP 101251]
warning: Lowest section in /usr/local/lib/libicudata.so.58 
[New Thread 810a16000 (LWP 101251/owncloud)]
qt5ct: using qt5ct plugin
[New Thread 823240500 (LWP 101344/owncloud)]
[New Thread 81bb51b00 (LWP 101343/owncloud)]


I think it can be closed.

Sorry for that.
Thank you.
